title: UAE emergency alert: 5 things to do, one to never do if you see falling shrapnel or missile debris amid US-Israel war on Iran
summary_full: Missile interceptions are now a reality for Gulf residents. Fragments from intercepted threats are falling, causing injuries and damage. Authorities in the UAE are issuing crucial safety advice. Residents must stay calm, move away from debris, seek shelter indoors and report any findings immediately. Never touch or approach suspicious objects. Official updates are vital for safety during these uncertain times.
